description: Study pipeline must start with /self-learn as Step 1 (sets the canonical pipeline order)
Pipeline state must be tracked in audit-flag.json so --resume can determine which step to resume from

Step 5 must create the review task via the central filer `scripts/gh-tasks/create-task-issue.sh` (centralized canonical-label assembly; replaces both the old append-to-inbox.md flow and the inline `gh issue create` call retired in #159)
